channel.title: Internship & Graduate — Research & Polling
channel.description: Job listings for Research & Polling roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Junior Quantitative Research Intern - Creative Excellence
item.dc:creator: Ipsos

item.title: Research Analyst
item.description: What makes this role important at Ipsos? We are looking for someone who is passionate about market research and motivated by a fast-paced and challenging work environment. This is an excellent entry-level opportunity for someone who is interested in starting a career in market research. What you can expect to be doing: Manage the launching and ongoing maintenance of research studies Creation and maintenance of technical specifications in proprietary software for study questionnaires Quality check study questionnaires & perform in-depth quality checks at every stage of the process Liaising with our internal data collection teams, coding & data processing teams Perform data verification Identify and solve project issues as they arise This might be the job for you if you have: Completed bachelor's degree Relevant project management and/or market research experience an asset Outstanding verbal and written communication skills Excellent problem solving, critical thinking and analytical skills Proactive, “can do” attitude High attention to detail: ability to balance overall project goal with key milestones and tasks Advanced proficiency with MS Office Suite; specifically, PowerPoint and Excel Self-starter with superior organization skills who thrives in a deadline driven environment Ability to juggle multiple projects and diplomatically respond to conflicting needs Bilingual an asset, but not required. If you don’t meet 100% of the requirements, we encourage all who feel they might be a fit for the opportunity to apply. We may consider a variety of backgrounds for a particular role and are also committed to considering candidates for available positions throughout our organization, not just the one you’re applying to! In accordance with Ontario & British Columbia law, the estimated base salary for this role is $55,000. Your final base salary will be determined based on several non-discriminatory factors which may include but are not limited to location, work experience, s
item.dc:creator: Ipsos

item.title: Market Research Project Manager
item.description: Currently we are looking for highly motivated professionals to join our team as Market Research Project Manager. Main Responsibilities: Build and maintain effective working relationships with internal stakeholders and team members Find feasible solutions in a variety of situations for both client and production teams (ad-hoc questions, additional deliverables, etc.) Administrative tasks related to Project Management details (KPIs, Projects Data Base, and etc.) Prepare, plan, prioritise and communicate effectively to ensure deliverables are prepared and sent to schedule Complying with operational scope, and managing budgets, timeline and quality per the project requirements Support preparation of core deliverables using Research Team platforms, techniques and technologies e.g. PowerPoint / Excel / Online portal / etc. Check data sets for logical consistency prior to analysis Manipulate data into correct format for analysis purposes using Excel or SPSS (weighting and processing as relevant) Support analysis according to client’s requirements or objectives Quality checking key deliverables, ensuring they are delivered accurately and to the highest quality Populate reports (PowerPoint) and writing commentary to draw out the key learnings and provide recommendations Update DP Spec based on questionnaire changes Update other tools and platforms e.g. Data Portals based on questionnaire changes Work alongside Research team in delivering bespoke and added-value analysis and insight. Our Requirements: 1+ year/s of work experience as a Market Research Executive or similar position in a Market Research Agency Technical skills in data manipulation (e.g. using Excel) or software such as SPSS will be considered as an advantage Strong general analytical skills using quantitative data Excellent planning, organizational and analytical skills Good communication and stakeholder management skills Experience in budgeting and controlling Very good English language command– both written an
item.dc:creator: Ipsos

item.title: Audiance Measurement SL Leader, Croatia
item.description: What is in it for you? This opportunity provides you with a platform to: Influence new product development Drive growth opportunities across Ipsos – commercial growth and P&L influence Lead and inspire indirect teams across Research, Operations, Sales, and Marketing to execute the product roadmap effectively. Act as the primary advocate for Ipsos’s syndicated capabilities Key Responsibilities: Product Portfolio Strategy & Vision - Portfolio Oversight: Managing relationships with clients, understanding their needs, and providing strategic data-driven insights. Leading the AUM team to ensure effective service delivery. Overseeing financial performance, including budgeting and ensuring profitability. Utilizing demographic profiles, media consumption data, and product and brand usage information to generate insightful reports. Informing and shaping media and marketing strategies based on data insights. Overseeing the BrandPuls product lifecycle, from data collection coordination to report design and delivery. This role requires a blend of analytical expertise, client-facing skills, and commercial acumen to drive the growth and success of BrandPuls. Overseeing MediaPulse and DotMetrics product lifecycles, from data collection coordination to report design and delivery. This role requires a blend of analytical expertise, client-facing skills, and commercial acumen to drive the growth and success of the Brandpuls and MediaPuls services. New Product Development (NPD): Lead the end-to-end process of identifying, packaging, and monetizing new data-driven products to expand our market footprint. Product Leadership & Operations The Audience Measurement Service Line encompasses multiple services such as: Brand: BrandPuls measures brand strength based on marketing performance indicators like brand awareness, experience, usage, and loyalty, allowing for the comparison of a large number of brands across different product categories (FMCG and non-FMCG). Digital: Insights into intern
item.dc:creator: Ipsos
